description: Fix 6 bugs: dashboard blank page, Pomodoro light mode timer text, PATCH /api/calendar/events/{id} endpoint, Day View alignment, persistent AI chat FAB, and toast error handling.
steps: Fix dashboard blank page - ensure page always renders content even when API data is empty
Fix Pomodoro light mode timer text - use text-[var(--text-primary)] for visibility
Fix Day View calendar alignment in app/dashboard/calendar/page.tsx
Move AI chat button/panel to app/dashboard/layout.tsx for all pages
Add error handling in AIContextProvider.tsx for PATCH 405 failures
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard page always renders greeting + stats + quick actions, never blank
Pomodoro timer text is visible in both light and dark modes
PATCH /api/calendar/events/{id} endpoint works for event updates
Day view time labels align with their hour rows
AI chat button appears on all dashboard pages
AI context suggestions continue working after a PATCH 405 error
